project: i2i - Gimnasio Premium para Mujeres Ejecutivas
brand_style: Ultra premium women-only executive gym, Equinox / Barry's Bootcamp / Alo Yoga aesthetic. Flawless women in premium activewear doing diverse exercises.
brand_persona: Ultra-premium women-only executive fitness experience. Equinox exclusivity meets Alo Yoga aesthetic - flawless form, designer activewear, and gym spaces that feel like luxury hotels. For the woman who closes deals and deadlifts.
photography_direction: Dramatic directional gym lighting with clean darks. Some scenes use bright yoga-studio naturals. Muscle definition and form are paramount. Skin has a healthy glow, never unflattering sweat. Equipment is pristine. Every strand of hair is controlled even mid-exercise.
negative_prompt_default: deformed, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, flat skin, plastic skin, blurry, artifacts, grid lines, ugly, disfigured, cropped, cut off legs, cut off feet, missing limbs, extra fingers, logo text, brand name visible, messy gym, dirty equipment, sweat stains, cheap fabric, men, male, sepia, desaturated, muted colors, vintage filter, color cast, yellowed, faded colors
